title: Breadcrumb
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Breadcrumb helpers with ordered-list navigation semantics, current-page state, separators, ellipsis, and local icon rendering.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Breadcrumb helpers with ordered-list navigation semantics, current-page state, separators, ellipsis, and local icon rendering.

registry.reason: The Breadcrumb demo example uses the local shadcn Button for the ellipsis menu trigger.
Breadcrumb dropdown examples mirror the documented composition with the local shadcn Dropdown Menu item.
shadcn Breadcrumb uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helpers.
Provides Effect Schema metadata for Breadcrumb style options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin render-prop prop merging is represented by explicit Foldkit attributes and local class helpers.
Origin render slots are represented by native Foldkit Html helpers.
Origin separator, ellipsis, dot, and chevron icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in installable source.
Origin link examples are represented by native anchor hrefs in installable source and a fixture-only Next Link shim for parity.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic Arabic example data.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: BreadcrumbBasic
examples.description: Basic Breadcrumb with Home and Components links followed by the current page.
examples.distinguishes: Basic Breadcrumb with Home and Components links followed by the current page.
examples.snippet:
export const BreadcrumbBasic = (): Html =>
  breadcrumbShell([
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('#', 'Home')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('#', 'Components')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbPage('Breadcrumb')]),
  ])

examples.title: BreadcrumbDemo
examples.description: Default docs Breadcrumb with an ellipsis dropdown trigger.
examples.distinguishes: Default docs Breadcrumb with an ellipsis dropdown trigger.
examples.snippet:
export const BreadcrumbDemo = (): Html =>
  breadcrumbShell([
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('#', 'Home')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([ellipsisMenuButton()]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('#', 'Components')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbPage('Breadcrumb')]),
  ])

examples.title: BreadcrumbDropdown
examples.description: Breadcrumb with a custom dot separator and a components dropdown trigger.
examples.distinguishes: Breadcrumb with a custom dot separator and a components dropdown trigger.

examples.title: BreadcrumbEllipsisDemo
examples.description: Collapsed Breadcrumb state using the ellipsis helper.
examples.distinguishes: Collapsed Breadcrumb state using the ellipsis helper.
examples.snippet:
export const BreadcrumbEllipsisDemo = (): Html =>
  breadcrumbShell([
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('/', 'Home')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([BreadcrumbEllipsis<never>()]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('/docs/components', 'Components')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbPage('Breadcrumb')]),
  ])

examples.title: BreadcrumbLinkDemo
examples.description: Breadcrumb links using explicit local href attributes instead of an upstream router component.
examples.distinguishes: Breadcrumb links using explicit local href attributes instead of an upstream router component.
examples.snippet:
export const BreadcrumbLinkDemo = (): Html =>
  breadcrumbShell([
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('#link-component', 'Home')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('#link-component', 'Components')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator(),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbPage('Breadcrumb')]),
  ])

examples.title: BreadcrumbRtl
examples.description: RTL Breadcrumb using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Breadcrumb using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector.

examples.title: BreadcrumbSeparatorDemo
examples.description: Breadcrumb with custom dot separator children.
examples.distinguishes: Breadcrumb with custom dot separator children.
examples.snippet:
export const BreadcrumbSeparatorDemo = (): Html =>
  breadcrumbShell([
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('/', 'Home')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator([dotIcon()]),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbLink('/components', 'Components')]),
    breadcrumbSeparator([dotIcon()]),
    breadcrumbItem([breadcrumbPage('Breadcrumb')]),
  ])

deviations.summary: Icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the icon slots, geometry, and aria-hidden contract.

deviations.summary: Examples use native anchor hrefs instead of next/link render props.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on Next.js. Native links preserve the documented anchor semantics for BreadcrumbLink.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin app language selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector.

deviations.summary: Dropdown examples render the documented closed menu state with deterministic fixture markup.
deviations.rationale: Breadcrumb parity should verify breadcrumb structure while the Dropdown Menu component owns menu positioning, opening, and keyboard interaction coverage.
